items.title: Pramp
items.note: Free peer-to-peer mock interviews with auto-matching and structured timer.

items.title: interviewing.io
items.note: Anonymous mock interviews with engineers from top companies; high signal, paid.

items.title: Tech Interview Handbook — System Design Primer
items.note: Compact reference for the system-design portion of mocks.

items.title: Cracking the Coding Interview — Gayle Laakmann McDowell
items.note: Classic preparation reference covering coding, design and behavioural rounds.
